title: Science & Environment in the White House: What Did Obama Do? What Is Trump Doing? What Should We Do?
summary: Professor John P. Holdren gave the inaugural address for the Center of Biological Risk at the University of Connecticut on October 9, 2017.
body: Overview Professor John P. Holdren gave the inaugural address for the Center of Biological Risk at the University of Connecticut on October 9, 2017.
